## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test` and/or `pytest`)
- [ ] `npm run lint` is clean
- [ ] If the protocol changed, both TS (`packages/protocol`) and Python (`sdk/python`) mirrors were updated
- [ ] If a feature was added, a test was added
- [ ] If user-facing behavior changed, the README was updated
- [ ] No simulated/fake model data was introduced in the product (test fixtures are fine)
